ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., CS101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Introduction to Computer Science) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "learning_objectives" TEXT /* Learning objectives of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Examination, Continuous Assessment) */,
  "percentage_of_credit" REAL /* Percentage of credit the assessment contributes to the final grade */,
  "size_of_assessment" TEXT /* Size or duration of the assessment (e.g., 3 hours, 30 minutes) */,
  "ilos_assessed" TEXT /* Intended learning outcomes (ILOs) assessed */,
  "feedback_method" TEXT /* Method of feedback (e.g., Written feedback, Verbal feedback) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment is administered */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intended_learning_outcomes" (
  "ilo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ILO */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the ILO belongs to */,
  "ilo_description" TEXT /* Description of the ILO */,
  "ilo_code" TEXT /* Code for the ILO (e.g., ILO1, ILO2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ilo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intended_learning_outcomes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_methods" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback method */,
  "feedback_method" TEXT /* Name of the feedback method (e.g., Written feedback, Verbal feedback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback log */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment result */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_given_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES assessment_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_logs_feedback_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_method_id") REFERENCES feedback_methods ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ilo_assessments" (
  "ilo_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ILO-assessment link */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "ilo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ILO assessed by the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ilo_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ilo_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ilo_assessments_ilo_id FOREIGN KEY ("ilo_id") REFERENCES intended_learning_outcomes ("ilo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_submissions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the student */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_courses" (
  "instructor_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor-course link */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taught by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
